lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll give the Skullball Course a go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the instructions for using the skullball course?

lines.speaker: Skullball Boss
lines.text: The skullball comes out of one of these four spawnholes. Just kick the ball through the middle of each goal, through the skeleton's feet.

lines.speaker: Skullball Boss
lines.text: There are 10 goals, which you must complete in order, and one final goal.

lines.speaker: Skullball Boss
lines.text: An arrow will point to your ball, just in case lots of people are using the course at the same time as yourself.

lines.speaker: Skullball Boss
lines.text: The better your time, the more agillity XP you will be awarded. The timer starts when you score your first goal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the instructions for using the skullball course?

lines.speaker: Skullball Boss
lines.text: The skullball comes out of one of these four spawnholes. Just kick the ball through the middle of each goal, through the skeleton's feet.

lines.speaker: Skullball Boss
lines.text: There are 10 goals, which you must complete in order, and one final goal.

lines.speaker: Skullball Boss
lines.text: An arrow will point to your ball, just in case lots of people are using the course at the same time as yourself.

lines.speaker: Skullball Boss
lines.text: The better your time, the more agillity XP you will be awarded. The timer starts when you score your first goal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I seem to have lost my ball - can I have another one?

lines.speaker: Skullball Boss
lines.text: No problem, here's another one. You'll have to start from the beginning again, but the timer will be restarted too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I give up, I can't do it - take my ball away.

sections.title: When not wearing the ring of Charos

lines.speaker: Skullball Boss
lines.text: Grrr - you don't belong in here, human!
